scripts.predev: npm run setup && npm run build -w @vk/contracts
scripts.dev: dotenv -e .env.local -- concurrently -k -n web,orchestrator -c cyan,magenta "npm run dev -w @vk/web" "npm run dev -w @vk/orchestrator"
scripts.build: npm run build -w @vk/contracts && npm run build -w @vk/orchestrator && npm run build -w @vk/web
scripts.start: dotenv -e .env.local -- concurrently -k -n web,orchestrator -c cyan,magenta "npm run start -w @vk/web" "npm run start -w @vk/orchestrator"
scripts.typecheck: npm run build -w @vk/contracts && npm run typecheck -ws --if-present
scripts.test: npm run build -w @vk/contracts && npm run test -ws --if-present
